title: L e g s
description: Adds leg mobs to the game, an Official port from the Curseforge version.
body:
**_L e g._**

what is wrong with me.

 

Okay, so, This mod adds a literall leg to Minecraft, that's it.
I don't how could effect someone's experience aside from making it funnier because of the voicelines i decided to record.

**_REQUIRES:_**

- Geckolib.
